purpose: Build EditorLens MK-12 Premiere Pro Plugin (Adobe UXP)

agents.name: Luna
agents.role_description: Creative architecture lead. Drives innovative UX patterns for the marker heatmap, confidence visualization, and plugin interactions.

agents.name: Nova
agents.role_description: UX innovation specialist. Designs micro-interactions, animation patterns, and content mark visualization.

agents.name: Forge
agents.role_description: Core systems engineer. Implements state machine, WebSocket manager, and crash recovery. UXP API expert.

agents.name: Steel
agents.role_description: Protocol and data engineer. Implements Edit Package v3, NDJSON streaming, virtual list performance.

agents.name: Atlas
agents.role_description: System architect. Designs module boundaries, data flow, component composition, and adapter patterns.

agents.name: Prism
agents.role_description: Quality assurance lead. Reviews all code for UXP compliance, performance issues, edge cases, and testing gaps.

agents.name: Bolt
agents.role_description: Implementation specialist. Rapid code output for components, keyboard shortcuts, bulk operations, packaging.

agents.name: Shield
agents.role_description: Security and compliance. Validates UXP sandbox compliance, data protection, input validation, error handling.
